findings.summary: F1 BLOCKER: uniqueAgents/uniqueModels computed from records() which includes .slice(0, 15). Fixed by splitting records() into fullRecords+records, deriving filter options from fullRecords.
F2 MAJOR: onClear() missing debouncedSetSearch.clear() — stale debounce can reapply old query after clear. Fixed by adding .clear() call.
F3 MAJOR: Type augmentation for Session type missing from executed code. Fixed by adding declare module block after imports.
F4 MAJOR: Self-referential filter dropdowns — same root cause as F1. Combined fix: derive options from full pre-slice pool.
